name: Internship Cover Letter
description: A professional cover letter used when applying for an internship position, highlighting academic background and motivation.
content:
{{full_name}}
{{address}}
{{phone}}
{{email}}
{{#if linkedin_portfolio}}LinkedIn/Portfolio: {{linkedin_portfolio}}{{/if}}

{{formatDate letter_date}}

{{company_name}}
{{#if attention_to}}Attn: {{attention_to}}{{else}}Human Resources / Internship Coordinator{{/if}}
{{company_address}}

RE: Application for {{internship_field}} Internship

Dear {{#if attention_to}}{{attention_to}}{{else}}Hiring Manager{{/if}},

I am writing to express my enthusiastic interest in a {{internship_field}} internship with {{company_name}}, as advertised on {{discovery_source}}. I am currently a {{year_of_study}} year student pursuing a degree in {{major_degree}} at {{university_name}}. I am eager to apply the theoretical concepts I have learned in my studies to real-world challenges within your esteemed organization during the {{internship_term}}.

I have followed {{company_name}}'s work closely, and I am particularly impressed by {{company_highlight}}. I believe an internship with your team would be the ideal environment for me to develop my skills in {{areas_of_interest}} while making a meaningful contribution to your ongoing projects.

My Qualifications & Skills:

{{skills_and_qualifications}}

Through my academic projects and extracurricular activities, I have developed a strong foundation in this field, along with excellent problem-solving and communication skills. I am highly motivated, eager to learn, and ready to take on new responsibilities.

Please find my resume {{#if (eq transcript_attached 'Yes')}}and academic transcript {{/if}}attached for your review. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background, skills, and enthusiasm align with the goals of your internship program.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

_________________________
{{full_name}}

fields.name: discovery_source
fields.label: Where did you see the posting?
fields.placeholder: e.g., your website, university career portal

fields.name: company_highlight
fields.label: What impresses you about the company?

fields.name: skills_and_qualifications
fields.label: Your Skills and Qualifications
fields.placeholder: Mention software skills, relevant coursework, leadership roles...
